original_prompt: the required hardware types need to be selectable as a drop down or checkboxes, for the product types
rephrased_goal: Refactor the hardware_requirements input in the Product Types modal to use dynamically generated checkboxes based on existing hardware item_types in the inventory.

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Fetch unique item_types when opening Product Type modal
subtasks_required: Update btn-add-product-type click handler to fetch items and extract unique item_types
Update edit-pt click handler to fetch items and extract unique item_types
tasks.testing_criteria: Array of unique item types is successfully generated and passed to getFormHTML.

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Refactor getFormHTML to render checkboxes
subtasks_required: Change the text input for hardware_requirements to a loop generating checkboxes
Pre-check checkboxes if the product type already requires them
tasks.analogy_reference: carve molds for each stone shape
tasks.testing_criteria: Modal displays checkboxes for all available item types.

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Update initFormJS to parse checkboxes
subtasks_required: Iterate over checked checkboxes to build the hwReqs array instead of reading a text input
tasks.testing_criteria: Saving a product type correctly saves an array of the selected hardware requirement strings.

subtasks_required: Ensure old comma-separated data is supported and pre-checked properly
tasks.testing_criteria: No regressions in product type saving.
